reports.description: Large hail up to at least 2,5 cm i.d. was reported. Significant damage to crops occurred. The time was based on radar data.
references: Eyewitness report via Tygodnik Poradnik Rolniczy (on Facebook), 20 JUL 2026.
Eyewitness report via Super Tydzień Chełmski (on Facebook), 21 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Large hail up to at least 2-3 cm i.d. (roughly estimated) was reported. Significant damage to crops occurred. The time was based on radar data.
references: "Wyszli w pole i zamarli. Z plonów nie zostało prawie nic", Tygodnik Rolniczy, 20 JUL 2026.
"Jeszcze w niedzielę liczył na plony. „Dziś został mi tylko badyl”", Tygodnik Rolniczy, 21 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Large hail up to 5 cm (maybe even larger) in diameter, time estimated by radar data. Very likely supercell, splitting one even. Reportedly, few people sustained light injuries.
references: Istramet, Facebook, 21 Jul 2026
Istramet, Facebook, 21 Jul 2026
istramet.hr, Četiri superćelije na moru, ledene gromade u Rovinju, stižu dojave o lakše ozlijeđenima, 21 Jul 2026
